name: ApprovalPrep Content Publication Policy
autoPublishAllowedWhen: content does not contain prohibited claims
regulated credit-sensitive content is not promoted without approval
route or asset has a registry record
source-backed claims are mapped when required
approvalRequiredWhen: content is credit-dispute or credit-repair adjacent
content contains state-specific legal or regulated financial claims
content is marked approval_required by a generation workflow
source coverage is missing for a factual regulated claim
